Comment.value: Called from button Create Title in card window New Title
Can be called from FAT Title TABLE during tests
Set BaseProject - this is set in DB on creation - all Titles will use BaseProj = "432D61A4-618C-4579-A4E4-427A6B521FDD"

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "title" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Title::Header txt id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "title" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Title::Sub header txt id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

Comment.value: start notJens when debugging - end on line 90 -----------------------
Import global codebase texts from Base project
Import all text variables from Base project
Create all default Links from Base project
Setup a new theme based on selected theme
Done with all blocks, modifiers, theme, text variables
Fix image before creating title on Funkis Cloud and Insights
This must be DONE after creating all Modifiers
Get the default Funkis Cloud environment
Create title on Funkis Cloud and adding the start package as a launch url

Calculation.Text: "https://" & Title Server Preview::URL & "/" & FAT Title::Export Title Sub Path & $title_site_directory & "/"
"https://" & Title Server Publish::URL & "/" & FAT Title::Export Title Sub Path & $title_site_directory & "/"

Comment.value: Create the title on Funkis Insight
